examples: Drivers use a joystick of sorts to steer and throttle the vehicle, which can spin in place and accelerates rather quickly.
Enough air-found mixture can seep around the throttle value and through the idle system to maintain the dieseling.
The cockpits use the same throttle.
Developed in house at Green Throttle for 1 or 2 players and is also touch-enabled.
Green Throttle is ahead of the curve in this department and providing a simple, affordable, and standardized solution.
